content:
🚨 4-Week Negotiable Instruments (NI) Drafting Internship Program

Build practical knowledge of the Negotiable Instruments Act, 1881 with hands-on training in Section 138 cheque bounce litigation, legal drafting, and court procedures.

What You'll Learn
• NI Act Fundamentals
• Legal Notice & Complaint Drafting
• Court Procedure & Case Analysis

👩‍🏫 Mentor: Adv. Sakshi Aswal

💻 Mode: Online
👥 Eligibility: Law Students & Legal Professionals
💰 Registration Fee: ₹149 (Refundable as per criteria)
📅 Last Date to Apply: 7th August 2026

🔗 Register Now: https://rzp.io/rzp/dsXTUog

📞 Queries: +91 97828 59038
📧 Email: Contact@legalvidhiya.com
comment: NI Act practice often turns on procedural precision—timelines, evidence handling, and notice strategy. Drafting skills matter most when theory meets courtroom realities.
